Hi, I am Akhil. I am a software developer who loves to build really cool stuff.

I am from the awesome city of Vishakhapatnam (Andhra Pradesh), completed my graduation with a Bachelors in Technology in Computer Science and Engineering from IIT Madras. Now I work with the super cool folks at BrowserStack.

I love to solve problems. Most of my interests are in the fields of Algorithms, Compilers, Computer Vision and Artificial Intelligence. I am proficient in C++, Python and Javascript. I have experience in working on Ruby and Go. Also experienced with technologies like NodeJs, Redis, MYSQL, MongoDb.

You can reach me at akhil.lb1@gmail.com
